title: NEGG Institutional Holdings and Ownership Structure - May 2026
text:
Newegg Commerce (NEGG) Institutional Investor Holdings and Ownership Analysis.

Current Ownership Structure (May 2026): Newegg Commerce is owned by 1.13% institutional shareholders, 115.62% Newegg Commerce insiders, and 0.00% retail investors. Another source reports that institutional ownership is 1.54% as of the most recent data.

Major Shareholders: Zhitao He is the largest individual Newegg Commerce shareholder, owning 11.14M shares representing 53.14% of the company.

Recent Trading Activity: Institutions have bought 836.2K shares of NEGG in the last quarter. Additionally, institutions have sold 961.3K shares of NEGG over the last quarter.

Stock Price Context: The share price as of April 6, 2026 is 39.22 / share.

Ownership Implications: The analysis indicates that Newegg Commerce has relatively low institutional ownership, with insiders holding the majority of the company's shares. This high insider ownership suggests significant founder/management control but also limits diversification of shareholder base. The recent quarter showing both buys and sells of institutional shares indicates mixed institutional sentiment toward the stock.
